title: Skypiea Faces Final Judgment
description: Luffy finally pushes back toward the real fight, carrying the only natural answer to Enel’s lightning power.
scene: Across pages 17, 18, this scene centers on Enel, Nami, Luffy, Aisa, Nola. Luffy finally pushes back toward the real fight, carrying the only natural answer to Enel’s lightning power.

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: What the hell did you do...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Which trash do you refer to?

summary: Luffy finally pushes back toward the real fight, carrying the only natural answer to Enel’s lightning power.
